hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); [[ "$file" == *.py ]] && [[ "$file" == */app/* || "$file" == */tests/* ]] && uv run ruff format "$file" || true
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); [[ "$file" == */app/models/*.py ]] && make db-schema || true
